info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the Pipeline Service. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub.

tags.name: Pipeline Resource
tags.description: This contains APIs for performing CRUD operations on Pipelines.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Organization identifier

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project identifier

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization methods other than the x-api-key header. If you are using the x-api-key header, this can be skipped.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items on each page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return.

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching the search term.

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Harness module which is part of the Pipeline.

parameters.name: filter_identifier
parameters.description: Identifier of an existing Filter.

example-pipeline-yaml.value:
pipeline:
  name: example pipeline
  identifier: example_pipeline
  allowStageExecutions: false
  projectIdentifier: example_project
  orgIdentifier: example_organization
  tags: {}
  stages:
    - stage:
        name: Example Build Stage
        identifier: example_build_stage
        description: ''
        type: Approval
        spec:
          execution:
            steps:
              - step:
                  name: Approval Step
                  identifier: Approval_Step
                  type: HarnessApproval
                  timeout: 1d
                  spec:
                    approvalMessage: |-
                      Please review the following information
                      and approve the pipeline progression
                    includePipelineExecutionHistory: true
                    approvers:
                      minimumCount: 1
                      disallowPipelineExecutor: false
                      userGroups: <+input>
                    approverInputs: []
              - step:
                  type: ShellScript
                  name: ShellScript Step
                  identifier: ShellScript_Step
                  spec:
                    shell: Bash
                    onDelegate: true
                    source:
                      type: Inline
                      spec:
                        script: <+input>
                    environmentVariables: []
                    outputVariables: []
                    executionTarget: {}
                  timeout: 10m
        tags: {}
    - stage:
        name: Example Deploy Stage
        identifier: example_deploy_stage
        description: ''
        type: Deployment
        spec:
          serviceConfig:
            serviceRef: <+input>
            serviceDefinition:
              spec:
                variables: []
              type: Kubernetes
          infrastructure:
            environmentRef: <+input>
            infrastructureDefinition:
              type: KubernetesDirect
              spec:
                connectorRef: <+input>
                namespace: <+input>
                releaseName: release-<+INFRA_KEY>
            allowSimultaneousDeployments: false
          execution:
            steps:
              - step:
                  name: Rollout Deployment
                  identifier: rolloutDeployment
                  type: K8sRollingDeploy
                  timeout: 10m
                  spec:
                    skipDryRun: false
            rollbackSteps:
              - step:
                  name: Rollback Rollout Deployment
                  identifier: rollbackRolloutDeployment
                  type: K8sRollingRollback
                  timeout: 10m
                  spec: {}
        tags: {}
        failureStrategies:
          - onFailure:
              errors:
                - AllErrors
              action:
                type: StageRollback

PipelineListRequestBody.description: Body for the filter properties for listing Pipelines.

example-list.value:
pipeline_tags:
  - key: pipeline_key
    value: pipeline_value
pipelines:
  - example_pipeline
name: Example Pipeline
description: This is an Example Pipeline.
module_properties:
  empty: true
  property_name: {}
tags:
  example-tag-1: example-tag-1-value
  example-tag-2: example-tag-2-value
filter_type: Connector
